config.seed_text: In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

TEXT:
In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us. Every time we checked on this new date (which might surprise you), our attention wandered back from that particular point into another one so much more than just staring at them each day while they read their paper reports for any last few days; instead I turned my eyes up towards other landmarks around the house with different colors or sizes depending upon how closely matched things seemed inside your head when reading between those two points! And now there would never be enough left over without having spent hours wandering through all kinds willy nilly…I'm not kidding myself – because many times within seconds every single piece of information about an object went out its way to explain
